# allCases

**Type Property**

A collection of all values of this type.

## Declaration

```swift
static let allCases: [MigrationDefaultSupportedOptions]
```

## Discussion

The `MigrationDefaultSupportedOptions` enumeration contains no cases, so this value is an empty array.
